title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the State Bank of India Act, 1955. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 1st July, 1955, vide notification No. S.R.O. 1077, dated 14th May, 1955, see Gazette of India, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
